_comment: Cognitive regime profiles from RPCS-1. Used for matching observed agent behavior to receiver regimes. Phase 2 diagnostic feature.

stable.description: Balanced operation across all primitives — agent is well-matched to its environment.

near_oscillation.description: High TI + high SG — agent risks revisiting decisions and refusing to commit.
typical_symptoms: Agent re-reads the same context repeatedly
Tool calls are issued, then immediately retried with slight variations
Agent fails to commit to a conclusion despite sufficient information

near_overload.description: High SG + low FT + low TI — agent acts on insufficient information.
typical_symptoms: Agent hallucinates tool calls or invents parameters
Agent reaches confident conclusions far too quickly
Retry logic triggers on valid outputs

near_freeze.description: Low UE + high FT — agent refuses to act, hedges endlessly.
typical_symptoms: Agent produces verbose hedging ('I cannot be certain...')
Agent requests clarification on well-specified tasks
Tool calls are never issued despite clear instructions
